'''鈭歭-l-k''' ('''kalalak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knife|knife]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knife|knife]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-l-k
|-
! Lemma
| kalalak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilalak|thilalak]] || [[word:jilalak|jilalak]] || [[word:shilalak|shilalak]] || [[word:kilalak|kilalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulalak|thuthulalak]] || [[word:jujulalak|jujulalak]] || [[word:shushulalak|shushulalak]] || [[word:kukulalak|kukulalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulalak|thulalak]] || [[word:julalak|julalak]] || [[word:shulalak|shulalak]] || [[word:kulalak|kulalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulalak|thulalak]] || [[word:julalak|julalak]] || [[word:shulalak|shulalak]] || [[word:kulalak|kulalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelalak|thelalak]] || [[word:jelalak|jelalak]] || [[word:shelalak|shelalak]] || [[word:kelalak|kelalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholalak|thotholalak]] || [[word:jojolalak|jojolalak]] || [[word:shosholalak|shosholalak]] || [[word:kokolalak|kokolalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholalak|tholalak]] || [[word:jolalak|jolalak]] || [[word:sholalak|sholalak]] || [[word:kolalak|kolalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholalak|tholalak]] || [[word:jolalak|jolalak]] || [[word:sholalak|sholalak]] || [[word:kolalak|kolalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lalak|th忙lalak]] || [[word:j忙lalak|j忙lalak]] || [[word:sh忙lalak|sh忙lalak]] || [[word:k忙lalak|k忙lalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalalak|thathalalak]] || [[word:jajalalak|jajalalak]] || [[word:shashalalak|shashalalak]] || [[word:kakalalak|kakalalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalalak|thalalak]] || [[word:jalalak|jalalak]] || [[word:shalalak|shalalak]] || [[word:kalalak|kalalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalak|thalalak]] || [[word:jalalak|jalalak]] || [[word:shalalak|shalalak]] || [[word:kalalak|kalalak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalalak|shalalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalalak|goshalalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalalak|gokishalalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalalakn眉|shalalakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalalaknkn眉|goshalalaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalakn眉|gokishalalakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalalaksh毛|shalalaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalalaknksh毛|goshalalaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalalaksh毛|gokishalalaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalakro|shalalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalaknkro|goshalalaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalakro|gokishalalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalakmu|shalalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalaknkmu|goshalalaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalakmu|gokishalalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalalaksher|shalalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalalaknksher|goshalalaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalalaksher|gokishalalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalalakng|shalalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalalaknkng|goshalalaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalalakng|gokishalalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalalakya|shalalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalalaknkya|goshalalaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalalakya|gokishalalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalalakyam|shalalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalalaknkyam|goshalalaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalalakyam|gokishalalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalakn眉sh毛|shalalakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalaknkn眉sh毛|goshalalaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalakn眉sh毛|gokishalalakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalakn眉ro|shalalakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalaknkn眉ro|goshalalaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalakn眉ro|gokishalalakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalakn眉mu|shalalakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalaknkn眉mu|goshalalaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalakn眉mu|gokishalalakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalaksh毛n眉|shalalaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalaknksh毛n眉|goshalalaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalaksh毛n眉|gokishalalaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalaksh毛ro|shalalaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalaknksh毛ro|goshalalaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalaksh毛ro|gokishalalaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalaksh毛mu|shalalaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalaknksh毛mu|goshalalaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalaksh毛mu|gokishalalaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalakron眉|shalalakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalaknkron眉|goshalalaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalakron眉|gokishalalakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalakrosh毛|shalalakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalaknkrosh毛|goshalalaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalakrosh毛|gokishalalakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalakromu|shalalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalaknkromu|goshalalaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalakromu|gokishalalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalakmun眉|shalalakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalaknkmun眉|goshalalaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalakmun眉|gokishalalakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalakmush毛|shalalakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalaknkmush毛|goshalalaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalakmush毛|gokishalalakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalakmuro|shalalakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalaknkmuro|goshalalaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalakmuro|gokishalalakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
